description:
The quiz assesses proficiency in core data structures such as stacks, lists, and trees, as well as algorithmic concepts and time‑complexity analysis. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty, offering a practical, instructional tone that guides learners through 20 targeted questions. The format emphasizes applied understanding rather than rote memorization.
Topics: Stacks, Lists, Trees, Algorithm design, Time complexity, Big O notation
Audience: Students and early‑career developers preparing for technical interviews or coursework in data structures and algorithms.
